basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 Years Age Relaxation: Persons with Disability: 10 years Ex-Serviceman: By the length of military service increased by 3 years Major Port Employees: Up to the age of 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Library Science/Library & Information Science, Certificate course in computer application, and 3 years post-qualification experience as Librarian.
qualification.details: Degree in Library Science / Library & Information Science. Certificate course in computer application from a recognized institution (min. 3 months). Post qualification experience of three years as Librarian in a reputed Library/ Institution.

selection_process: Written test (if 20 or more candidates apply) Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager (Library) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Deendayal Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Manager (Library) post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Assistant Manager (Library) post is 28th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Library Science/Library & Information Science, a Certificate course in computer application, and have at least three years of post-qualification experience as a Librarian.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Assistant Manager (Library) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Manager (Library) post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager (Library) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the IDA pattern scale ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 1,40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager (Library) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Manager (Library) post in the Deendayal Port Authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test, if 20 or more candidates apply, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the Deendayal Port Authority?
faq.answer: The Deendayal Port Authority is located in Gandhidham, Gujarat, with the pincode 370201.

faq.question: Q10. How should I submit the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online and then send a hard copy of the duly filled application form along with self-attested documents to the specified address before the last date.
